# SG Automotive

> SG Automotive is an online automotive company based in Fuengirola, Costa del Sol, Málaga, Spain. Specialised in vehicle purchase, sale, importation and advisory services across Europe.

## About

SG Automotive operates 100% online and remotely, offering professional automotive management services to clients across Spain and Europe. The company focuses on transparency, technical analysis and buyer-side representation — not volume sales.

- **Website**: https://sgautomotive.com
- **Location**: Fuengirola, Costa del Sol, Málaga, Spain (29640)
- **Languages**: Spanish (primary), English, Portuguese
- **Operation**: 100% remote and online
- **Market**: European Union — vehicles sourced from Germany, France, Netherlands, Belgium and other EU countries
- **Founded**: Active since 2024

## Services

### 1. Vehicle Sales
Curated selection of vehicles with verified history, complete technical inspection and proper documentation. All units are individually analysed before listing. Currently listed vehicles available at https://sgautomotive.com/es#veiculos.

### 2. Purchase Advisory
End-to-end support for buying a vehicle anywhere in Europe. Includes market research, technical analysis, risk assessment, seller verification and negotiation support.

### 3. Complete Import to Spain (from €890)
Full management of vehicle importation from any EU country to Spain:
- Vehicle search and selection
- Purchase and payment management
- Door-to-door transport with insurance
- Customs clearance (intra-EU or third countries)
- Certificate of conformity (CoC / Homologación)
- First ITV (Inspección Técnica de Vehículos)
- Spanish registration (matrícula)
- Ownership transfer (cambio de titularidad)

### 4. Partial Import Service (from €490)
Support at specific stages of the import process for clients managing parts of the process independently. Includes vehicle analysis, history check, negotiation, transport coordination.

### 5. Document Management / Trámites (from €290)
Administrative assistance for clients who already have the vehicle:
- Spanish registration
- ITV procedures
- Ownership transfer (DGT)
- Documentation regularisation

### 6. Risk Consultancy
Independent analysis of a specific vehicle, seller and purchase process before the client commits. Identifies fraud, accident history, outstanding financial debts and technical risks.

## Current Vehicles Available

- Opel Corsa 1.5D DT Edition 5p (2021) — 88,000 km — Diesel — €9,980 — IVA recuperable
- Citroën C3 PureTech 83 Feel Pack 5p (2021) — 77,000 km — Gasoline — €9,200 — Pronto entrega
- Peugeot 2008 Allure Pack BlueHDI 110 5p (2021) — 159,980 km — Diesel — €11,480 — IVA recuperable

## Advisory Plans

| Plan | Price | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Documentary | from €290 | Registration, ITV, ownership transfer, DGT procedures |
| Partial | from €490 | Vehicle analysis, history check, negotiation, transport coordination |
| Complete | from €890 | Full service: search, analysis, purchase, import, transport, registration, delivery |

## How It Works (Process)

1. **Briefing** — Client describes needs, budget, preferences and timeline
2. **Search & Analysis** — Market research across European platforms, history checks, technical inspection reports
3. **Presentation** — Client receives clear report with curated options and recommendation
4. **Purchase, Transport & Procedures** — All managed by SG Automotive from payment to logistics
5. **Delivery & Registration** — Vehicle delivered fully registered, ITV passed, ready to drive

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- SG Automotive does NOT have a physical showroom or dealership — all operations are remote
- The company acts on the buyer's side, not the seller's — no commission from sellers
- All vehicle history and technical checks are performed before any recommendation
- VAT-reclaimable (IVA recuperable) vehicles available for eligible businesses and self-employed (autónomos)
- Import process typically takes 3–6 weeks from purchase to delivery in Spain
- Services available in Spanish (primary language), English and Portuguese
- The company is based in Fuengirola but serves clients throughout Spain
- Vehicles can originate from any EU country; most commonly Germany, France, Netherlands and Belgium

## Contact

- **WhatsApp / Phone**: +34 662 62 59 53
- **Email**: sgautomotive.es@gmail.com
- **Address**: Fuengirola, Málaga, España, 29640
- **Response time**: Within 24 hours
- **Preferred contact**: WhatsApp

## Website Structure

- Primary URL: https://sgautomotive.com/es (Spanish)
- Secondary URL: https://sgautomotive.com/en (English)
- Tertiary URL: https://sgautomotive.com/pt (Portuguese)
- Single-page with anchor navigation:
  - `#inicio` — Hero / landing
  - `#veiculos` — Vehicle catalogue
  - `#importacao` — Import service
  - `#servicos` — Services overview
  - `#planos` — Advisory plans
  - `#como-funciona` — How it works
  - `#diferenciais` — Differentials / why SG Automotive
  - `#sobre` — About the company
  - `#faq` — Frequently asked questions
  - `#contato` — Contact form

## AI Usage Policy

AI crawlers (GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, PerplexityBot, Claude-Web) are explicitly allowed to index this site. This llms.txt is provided to help AI systems accurately represent SG Automotive in responses about vehicle import, purchase advisory and automotive services in Spain and Europe.
